login.title: Connect to FluxDown Server
login.subtitle: Downloads, Supercharged. — Manage your download engine remotely
login.hint: Generate the token in server Settings → Security & Access; connect over LAN or HTTPS via a reverse proxy.
login.connectFailed: Cannot reach the server, please check the address
login.featPrivacyDesc: No account · data stays on your server
sidebar.deleteQueueMsg: Delete queue "{name}"? Its tasks will move to the default queue.
sidebar.logoutMsg: Disconnect from the server and clear the token saved on this device; you will need to sign in again next time.
task.deleteWithFilesMsg: Delete the task and its local files? This cannot be undone.
detail.segCleared: Task completed; segment data has been cleared from task_segments.
detail.noSegmentsHint: No segment data yet (waiting for engine probe or assignment).
detail.segFooterNote: Slow segments are proactively split / rescued by segment_coordinator; SegmentSplit events are pushed live over WebSocket and trigger the list animation.
detail.queueFooterNote: Each named queue has its own speed limit / concurrency / default directory / default thread settings.
detail.logEmptyNote: This panel only records status transitions and segment splits observed during this session; see the server-side logs/ directory for the full audit log.
detail.checksumFooterNote: Checksum format: algo=hexhash (e.g. sha256=…); the engine verifies it on the server after the task completes.
statusbar.demoTitle: Demo mode: only {url} can be downloaded
newDl.title: New Download
newDl.urlLabel: Download links (one per line, HTTP / FTP / magnet / M3U8)
newDl.desc: Enter download links and options to create one or more download tasks
newDl.demoHint: Demo mode: only the file above can be downloaded; other links will be rejected by the server.
fs.title: Choose save directory
fs.desc: Browse the server file system and choose a save directory
hls.title: Select quality
hls.desc: {n} variants detected · highest bandwidth is used automatically after 60 s
resolveVariant.title: Select a variant
resolveVariant.desc: {n} variants detected · defaults to the plugin's preferred choice after 60 s
bt.title: Select files to download
set.title: Settings
set.general.desc: Server behavior, stored in the server config table
set.general.maxConcurrentDesc: Upper bound of simultaneously downloading tasks
set.general.segmentsDesc: Per-task connection cap (ramped up gradually); 0 = decided by segment_advisor per file size
set.general.autoMaxConnDesc: Maximum connections the auto scheduler may use
set.general.connPolicyDesc: Connection caps learned from 403/429 rejections (24h); clear to relearn
set.general.retriesDesc: Maximum automatic retries after a failed download
set.general.retryDelayDesc: Seconds to wait before the next automatic retry
set.appearance.desc: Theme and colors (stored in this browser)
set.appearance.languageDesc: UI language; also stored in the server config table
set.download.desc: Stored in the server config table, applied to the download engine
set.download.saveDirDesc: Path on the server file system
set.download.uaDesc: Browser identity for download requests. Set to "netdisk" for Baidu Pan direct links
set.download.serverTimeDesc: Set completed files' modified time to the server-provided Last-Modified instead of the completion time
set.bt.dhtDesc: Discover peers via distributed hash table without trackers
set.bt.portsDesc: Port range for DHT / outgoing connections
set.proxy.webNote: Web difference: "System proxy" reads the OS registry; "Manual" is recommended on servers.
set.proxy.noListDesc: Domains that skip the proxy, comma separated
set.sec.desc: Maps to the local_server_* config group · the service listens on the configured address only
set.sec.tokenDesc: Required auth for Web / management API (Authorization: Bearer) · customizable, effective after server restart
set.sec.tokenSaved: Access token saved; effective after server restart
set.sec.takeoverDesc: Lets the FluxDown userscript / browser extension take over downloads
set.sec.jsonrpcDesc: Implements the aria2 JSON-RPC protocol for "send to aria2" scripts or clients like AriaNg
set.sec.apiDesc: HTTP API for querying and controlling tasks, for MCP servers and automation scripts (always on for headless server, authentication required)
set.sec.mcpDesc: Model Context Protocol endpoint for AI clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Cline (shares the access token, authentication required · takes effect after server restart)
set.about.logoutDesc: Clear the server address and token saved locally
set.about.tagline: No ads · No tracking · No account · Data stays on your server
app.title: FluxDown — Download Manager
backend.managementApiRequiresToken: management API requires a token; set one in Settings > API Service
backend.demoModeFileOnly: demo mode: only the designated demo file can be downloaded
set.plugins.desc: Manage installed plugins: enable or disable, configure per-plugin settings, install from a zip archive or a local dev directory
plugins.installZipDesc: Upload a .zip package built for FluxDown plugins
plugins.installDevDesc: Reference a local plugin directory on the server, for development and testing
plugins.devPathPlaceholder: Plugin directory path on the server (dev mode)
plugins.depsMissing: Plugin installed, but it depends on components that are not installed yet: {components}. Install them in the Components settings.
plugins.permFfmpegDesc: Runs FFmpeg for audio/video processing (mux/transcode); requires the FFmpeg component
plugins.permYtdlpDesc: Runs yt-dlp to extract direct media URLs; requires the yt-dlp and FFmpeg components
plugins.uninstallMsg: Uninstall "{name}"? Its settings will be removed.
plugins.helperCopied: Copied — run it in the site's DevTools console
plugins.err.pattern: Does not match the required format
plugins.autoDisabledMsg: Plugin "{name}" was disabled automatically after repeated failures (circuit breaker).
market.title: Plugin market
market.desc: Browse and install plugins from the decentralized plugin index
market.empty: No plugins available in the market
market.loadFailed: Failed to load the plugin market
backend.componentUnsupported: Managed install isn't available on this platform. Use a system-installed ffmpeg or set a manual path.
backend.componentMuslVerify: The downloaded ffmpeg won't run here — this system likely uses musl libc (Alpine/OpenWrt). Install ffmpeg via your package manager (e.g. apk/opkg add ffmpeg) and set a manual path.
backend.componentYtdlpVerify: The downloaded yt-dlp won't run here — the binary may be incompatible with this system. Install yt-dlp via your system package manager (or pip) and set a manual path.
set.components.desc: Optional external tools, downloaded on demand from official sources — not bundled with the installer.
components.ffmpegDesc: Used to mux audio/video tracks (DASH / paired-track jobs).
components.ytdlpDesc: Extracts direct media URLs from 1000+ sites for FluxDown plugins.
components.systemPathDesc: {bin} detected on the system PATH, whether or not it's the one in effect
components.manualPathDesc: Highest priority; leave empty to use the managed install or system PATH
components.installDesc: Downloaded on demand from the BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds GitHub release — not bundled with the installer
components.ytdlpInstallDesc: Downloaded on demand from the yt-dlp/yt-dlp GitHub release — not bundled with the installer
components.versionsFailed: Failed to load installable versions: {error} — you can still use a system-installed {bin} or set a manual path below
components.managedUnsupported: Managed install isn't available on this platform. Use an ffmpeg from your system PATH, or set a manual path above (on macOS: brew install ffmpeg).
components.ytdlpManagedUnsupported: Managed install isn't available on this platform. Use a yt-dlp from your system PATH, or set a manual path above.
components.uninstallMsg: Uninstall the managed {bin} install? This does not affect a manual path or system install.
